findings.description: Complex diagram layout with spatial annotations flattened into linear text.
findings.evidence: The PDF presents a visual diagram of a 'SALE TAG' inside a bounding box, with lines and arrows pointing to explanatory text located in columns to the left and right of the tag. The HTML completely strips this visual structure, removing the box, lines, and arrows, and renders the tag content interleaved with the explanatory text in a single vertical column.
